entries.title: Tenel Ka Has Hapes/Jedi Dual Role

context.label: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and later post-NJO Legends unless a later deck is active.

content.fact: Tenel Ka bridges Jedi identity and Hapan political obligation.
content.injection: When Tenel Ka appears, include both Jedi discipline and Hapan royal/political constraints. Do not import later-era status, relationships, factions, or outcomes into this window.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
antiLore: Do not skip ahead to later character, faction, relationship, location, or event states.
content.notes: Generated development Lorecard pending human review.

content.fact: After Ithor, Corran Horn carries public and personal burden tied to the duel and ecological devastation.
content.injection: Post-Ithor, do not treat Corran as untouched by the consequences of that campaign. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Ithor Devastated.
Respect story-position bounds from Ithor Devastated to Ithor Devastated.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development Lorecard pending human review.

content.fact: Wedge Antilles’ Borleias role emphasizes operational ingenuity under impossible wartime pressure.
content.injection: In Borleias scenes, use Wedge’s experience and misdirection rather than generic command narration. Do not import later-era status, relationships, factions, or outcomes into this window.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Borleias Resistance.
Respect story-position bounds from Borleias Resistance to Borleias Resistance.

content.fact: Pellaeon’s Remnant can act pragmatically against the Yuuzhan Vong while retaining Imperial identity.
content.injection: Write Pellaeon as pragmatic and professional; cooperation does not make the Remnant a Rebel-style democracy. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Galactic Alliance transition.
Respect story-position bounds from Borleias Resistance to Battle of Ebaq 9.
